sentiment.reasoning: A reported 10% drop in new customer orders indicates a significant negative impact on future revenue and growth.

sentiment.reasoning: Opening a new office in a new region suggests business expansion and potential for future revenue growth.

sentiment.reasoning: Strong demand and a raised outlook indicate improved financial performance expectations for the company.

headlines.headline: Myrnon Therapeutics completes planned facility upgrade in Asia Pacific

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a planned facility upgrade suggests improved operational efficiency or increased capacity, which can positively impact future production or service delivery.

headlines.headline: Krevum Pharmaceuticals recalls products in enterprise software line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns will negatively impact sales, reputation, and incur costs for the company.

headlines.headline: Zelvix Therapeutics reports record quarterly revenue, up 18% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Reporting record quarterly revenue with significant year-over-year growth indicates strong financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
